name: dexthemes-build-week-video
description: Reproducible Remotion edit for the DexThemes OpenAI Build Week demo.

scripts.render:previs: npm run render:previs:source && remotion ffmpeg -y -i out/dexthemes-build-week-judge-previs-v9-phrasing-1m35s-source.mp4 -map 0:v:0 -map 0:a:0 -c:v copy -af loudnorm=I=-16:TP=-1.5:LRA=11 -c:a aac -b:a 192k -movflags +faststart out/dexthemes-build-week-judge-previs-v9-phrasing-1m35s.mp4
